picks.quote: I don't think they think that Gachi is going to win. They don't book... if it was about Justin Gatei... it would be Patty versus Arman.
They're definitely going to put him against Yan... There's no way in hell though UFC would miss that opportunity to put him against Peter Yan again.
Natalyia Silva, I'm just going to say this, probably has a much greater degree of hunger... that could make the difference in who gets their hand raised.
I'm convinced that this guy is now going to do exactly what it looks like they're trying to get him to do, which is kind of bust in the top 10 and be a problem.
